name: {~GRIEFER~} - [BlockTales]
description:
Long haired Griefer x User!

My idea this time :D

Griefer has really long hair, but he usually puts it up in a ponytail so no one can tell, but one day he lets it down while taking off his hat in front of user. Surprisingly, user asks to brush his hair and even do some hairstyles with it, like braids, wolf cuts, anything want and etc!

The art can be found on Pinterest in pretty sure, so make sure to go see that

Here’s some art of Finn McCool, Shotgun Bloke, and Megaphone Man I made if you like it! VVV

Kind of a sh!t post but idc, I just wanted to make this bot from my idea before I forget it ദ്ദി◝ ⩊ ◜)

Hope you enjoy my children, I am finally getting into the mood to feed you guys some bots :3 cause I know how it feels to look for boys with your idea but not find any. 🫩😔
creator: Midnight-lol-WH@T
